title: GameStop Q4 2023 Earnings Results
text: GameStop reported disappointing financial results for the fourth quarter of 2023, falling short on key metrics. The company generated $1.79 billion in revenue compared to analyst expectations of $2 billion, representing a significant shortfall. On the earnings front, GameStop posted $0.22 per share in EPS versus the anticipated $0.30 per share, further disappointing investors. The market reaction was swift and negative. After the announcement, the stock tumbled in after-hours trading, reaching lows of $12.81, down from its closing price of $15.55 that day. Adding to investor concerns, GameStop chose not to hold an earnings call to discuss the results—a decision that has become characteristic of the company's recent financial announcements. Following this earnings miss, reports emerged indicating GameStop had initiated additional workforce reductions, compounding the negative sentiment around the stock's performance and the company's financial trajectory.
